chunks.text: Web Developer with 3+ year of experience in React, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript, skilled in building social platforms, e-commerce apps, and admin dashboards with modern UI, API integrations, and scalable architecture. Krishna Mahto SOFTWARE ENGINEER DiveBuddies PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE SKILLS Languages : Javascript, Typescript, Java SUMMARY • Developed Dive Buddies, a social platform for scuba divers to share posts and explore dive sites, delivering a seamless community experience. • Built a modern, animation-rich landing page to enhance user engagement and showcase platform features with interactive design. • Implemented an Admin Portal for mobile app management with key modules: Sites Management, User Management, Dashboard, and Content Management. PetPalz • Developed PetPalz, a social platform for pet owners with features including user posts, pet hospitals, and pet stores, implementing the application from scratch. • Built PetPalz Admin Dashboard with modules for User Management, Analytics Dashboard, Pet Shops, Pet Stores, Notifications, and Authentication, enabling seamless platform administration. • Designed and deployed a multi-language landing page (English & Arabic) for
